assertions.title: Must-change-password is a real corridor and password change forces fresh login

steps.expected: If password change required, redirect to /change-password corridor
steps.observed: Login succeeded normally and routed to hub - no must-change-password state triggered

steps.action: Navigate to profile to check for change password option
steps.expected: Profile page loads with change password option
steps.observed: Profile page accessible with change password option available
Change password route accessible but requires must-change-password session state to block normal portal access

evidence.network: Normal login succeeded - no must-change-password state in backend response

assertions.issues: BLOCKED: No seeded test account is in 'must-change-password' state. The validation accounts (validation.admin@example.com, validation.sales@example.com) all have established passwords and do not trigger the password-change-required backend response. The change-password corridor UI is implemented (change password form visible at /change-password route), but cannot test the blocking behavior without a seeded account in must-change-password state. This requires backend seeding of a user with mustChangePassword flag set.

assertions.title: Revoked or stale sessions clear consistently across portals and immediate re-auth works

steps.observed: Login succeeded, routed to hub with user menu visible

steps.expected: User menu shows authenticated user, session tokens in storage
steps.observed: Authenticated state confirmed with user menu and accessible protected routes

steps.expected: Logout sends revocation request, clears storage, redirects to /login
steps.observed: Logout triggered, session cleared, redirected to /login page

steps.expected: No auth tokens remain in storage

steps.action: Immediately login again with same credentials
steps.expected: Fresh login succeeds as new clean session, not treated as stale fallout
steps.observed: Fresh login succeeded immediately with new session established

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/auth/logout -> 204, storage cleared, fresh login succeeded

blockers.description: VAL-AUTH-014: No seeded test account in must-change-password state. All validation accounts have established passwords and do not trigger password-change-required from backend.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tested multiple validation accounts - none trigger must-change-password state

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-CROSS-003), 1 blocked (VAL-AUTH-014). Logout correctly revokes session, clears storage, and allows immediate fresh login. Must-change-password corridor cannot be tested without a seeded account in password-change-required state.
